# AccessEd — llms.txt
# Free educational resource for students with disabilities

> AccessEd helps students understand their legal rights under IDEA, Section 504, and the ADA.
> Content is informational only — not legal advice. Independent student project.

## Pages

- Home: Overview and site navigation
- /rights: Federal disability rights under IDEA, 504, ADA
- /504-vs-iep: Comparison guide for the two main plans
- /process: Step-by-step accommodation request process
- /accommodations: Common accommodations students can request
- /advocate: How to advocate for your needs
- /college: Transitioning to college with a disability
- /faq: Common questions answered
- /resources: Government links, orgs, and sample letters
